---
title: "Upcoming Workshop and Hackathon at iEMSs 2025"
date: "2025-06-01"
categories: [workshop, hackathon, iEMSs, upcoming]
description: "DaMIfLL is organising a workshop and hackathon at the iEMSs 2025 conference. Join us to collaboratively develop data standards and tools for landscape modelling."
---

We are excited to announce that DaMIfLL will host a workshop and hackathon at the
International Environmental Modelling and Software Society (iEMSs) 2025 conference.

The event will bring together researchers and practitioners to collaboratively tackle
data interoperability challenges in landscape and land use modelling. Participants will
work hands-on with datasets and tools in a hackathon format.

More details on registration and the programme will follow soon.
